message:
fix(ballast): set 0o600 permissions on ballast file creation

Ballast files created via OpenOptions now get owner-only permissions on
Unix to prevent other users from tampering with them (which could block
emergency space reclamation). Also fixes a rustfmt inconsistency in
cli_app.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
